title: Blossoming Season
description: Adds 2 new biomes, 3 new flowers, lattices, a new tree and a new potion. Tiny mod, big fun.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7529f2fbf85c69f0eb40c708148740901cfd863f_0.webp)
# Blossoming Seasons
**Blossoming Seasons is a mod that aims to bring more blooming biomes like the Cherry Grove. It is small, but enough to add even more beauty to the overworld.**

## Features:

<details>
<summary>Blossoming Forest biome</summary>

The Blossoming Forest is a biome full of oak, cherry and exclusive jacaranda Trees. It is lush, carpeted with pink and periwinkle petals, and broken apart by springs. It is adorned with mysterious Fox Statues... It also contains new decorative flowers, the hibiscus bush, which also spawns in mangrove swamps.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Lushier Cherry Grove</summary>
  
Cherry Groves have been slightly revamped with the addition of rose bushes, lilacs and peonies scattered around, and small azalea hedges.


</details>

<details>
<summary>Lavender and Lavender Fields</summary>

Lavender Fields are new biomes that are flat, large, and covered with the new lavender bushes and anemones. Collect lavender with shears to be able to craft purple dye, or brew the new Serinity potion.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Serinity</summary>

Serinity is a new effect that can only be taken from Serinity Potions, it restores three hearts and cures poison, removes nausea and can extinguish players on fire when they are below four hearts.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Jacaranda Trees</summary>

Jacarandas are new blossoming trees similar to cherry trees, a jacaranda's core is of an icy lavender color, sitting well along the pale oaks and cherries.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Lattices</summary>

Lattices are new decorative blocks that can be made for every types of wood and act like glass panes.

</details>

Made with MCreator.
